articles.originalTitle: Mbappé critical of tactics in loss by 'sloppy' Fra...
articles.originalSummary: Kylian Mbappé seemed to question Didier Deschamps' approach and tactics after France's 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinal Tuesday.

articles.originalTitle: FIFA defends 'world-class' ref after France critic...
